summary: Added Store.ListDueWatches with cadence-gated WHERE clause; `watch run` calls it by default; new --force flag falls back to ListWatches.
reason: watch run iterated every domain on every cron tick regardless of cadence_hours, making the cadence configuration a no-op for users wiring `watch run` into cron.
validated_outcome: Smoke-tested `watch run --dry-run` and `watch run --dry-run --force` — the dry_run payload reports the force flag end-to-end.
